case_title: ANNIECHEN TRAN et al VS. TAMAS DUSNOKI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 - SERVED APR-08-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DUSNOKI, TAMAS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 5/17/13. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TRAN, ANNIECHEN KANG, SANG-MO AS TO DEFENDANT DUSNOKI, TAMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-12-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. "DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $2,500 WHICH IS AGREEABLE TO PLAINTIFF IF PAID WITHIN 2 WEEKS." PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
